author: Sepehr Mahmoudian
execution_rule: Execute in ID order. A task may be verified only after every dependency is verified or truthfully disposed as not_claimed where narrowing is permitted.

status_definitions.implemented: Normative artifact and implementation evidence exist, but the phase/full verification gate has not yet closed.
status_definitions.verified: All applicable acceptance evidence and reviews pass.
status_definitions.not_claimed: Optional capability is absent and every related public claim has been removed; this is not success for a core gate.

tasks.phase_title: Freeze authority model, claims, threat model and immutable audit cut
tasks.title: Create an immutable audit manifest for source, dependencies, NCP revision, deployment assets and evidence.

ten_lens_review.correctness_and_invariants: The audit cut records the exact clean commit/tree and all supplied handoff file digests.
ten_lens_review.safety_and_failure_behavior: A failed checksum or baseline command is not represented as success; the recorded baseline exit status is zero.
ten_lens_review.security_and_adversarial_behavior: Mutable names are accompanied by immutable digests or peeled commits; no release authority is granted by this manifest.
ten_lens_review.determinism_and_reproducibility: The complete baseline output is retained with an uncompressed SHA-256 and deterministic gzip metadata.
ten_lens_review.performance_and_bounded_resources: The manifest and baseline have explicit byte/line counts; T000 adds no runtime path.
ten_lens_review.api_schema_and_compatibility: The 0.9 Haldir label is separated from the independently versioned NCP 0.8 protocol pin.
ten_lens_review.observability_and_provenance: Source, toolchain, dependency, deployment, formal, evidence, author, and publication-state provenance are explicit.
ten_lens_review.testing_and_independent_evidence: The untouched P0-R gate passed 19 of 19 checks; independent review remains a later named gate and is not fabricated.
ten_lens_review.documentation_and_operator_usability: The qualification README links each retained artifact and states the NO-GO posture.
ten_lens_review.ecosystem_composition_and_governance: The NCP tag object and peeled commit are recorded; no cross-repository change or unsupported integration claim is made.

residual_risks: The audit manifest proves the starting cut, not the eventual 0.9 release commit.
External reviewer identity and approval are deliberately absent until a real reviewer acts.

tasks.phase_title: Freeze authority model, claims, threat model and immutable audit cut
tasks.title: Write the normative authority model and identify the sole principal allowed to create plant commands.

ten_lens_review.correctness_and_invariants: The operational definition counts unauthorized final-route bypass frames as plant commands, avoiding a tautological sole-authority claim; the normative rule identifies one logical Gate principal.
ten_lens_review.safety_and_failure_behavior: Every failed or absent authorization conjunct produces no Gate-authored command, while ALLOW(HOLD) remains a bounded zero-velocity command rather than a denial or physical-safety claim.
ten_lens_review.security_and_adversarial_behavior: The verifier rejects a second final publisher, a spoofed Gate role, missing non-Gate denial evidence, and decision/action vocabulary confusion; global bypass closure remains explicitly unclaimed.
ten_lens_review.determinism_and_reproducibility: The closed JSON model, normative-document digest, exact profile route, retained case identifiers, and Rust source vocabularies are checked offline without mutable network inputs.
ten_lens_review.performance_and_bounded_resources: The model, document, profile, evidence, requirement ledger, Git output, and compressed closure logs have explicit read or decompression limits; T001 adds no runtime control-path work.
ten_lens_review.api_schema_and_compatibility: The contract is limited to PRE_AUTHORITY_ACL_ONLY and distinguishes authenticated runtime principal, GATE_APPLICATION key role, publication evidence state, decision outcome, and semantic action.
ten_lens_review.observability_and_provenance: The model names the normative document, deployment profile, live ACL result, Rust contracts, Gate pipeline, author, and stable requirement identifier; exact-commit run evidence is required before verification.
ten_lens_review.testing_and_independent_evidence: Ten verifier tests cover positive, negative, malformed, bounded, adversarial, regression, and metamorphic cases; a Gate regression exercises ALLOW(HOLD), DENY, and ERROR at runtime; the retained ACL matrix is synthetic and a real independent human review is neither claimed nor fabricated.
ten_lens_review.documentation_and_operator_usability: The contract defines plant command, command creation, principal, protected route, decisions versus actions, the complete conjunction, and the precise claim boundary in operator-readable terms.
ten_lens_review.ecosystem_composition_and_governance: Crebain is kept as a downstream consumer boundary, controllers and advisory systems cannot widen authority, other deployment modes are deferred to T005, and no cross-repository change was made.

residual_risks: AclExclusiveEvidenceV1 is caller-constructible evidence rather than a non-forgeable, deployment-bound route capability.
Public lower-level Gate, adapter, session, and publisher surfaces mean complete mediation and global sole credential or publisher custody are not established by T001.
The retained live matrix proves only its bounded synthetic router experiment, not packaged Gate-to-Crebain delivery, application, or physical safety.
The Gate application and transport identities are not yet proven end-to-end to belong to one protected logical Gate deployment.
